executionHistory.summary: Commit c6e3dca: Auto-gen test token in scripts/commands/config.sh lines 314-318 (openssl rand -hex 24 with python3 secrets fallback when TARGET_ENV=test and SST auth_token is empty). Made docker-compose.yml env_file dynamic via SMACKEREL_ENV_FILE. Fixed integration health check to send Bearer auth header.

Two consecutive bash scripts/commands/config.sh --env test invocations produced different 48-char tokens (FRESHNESS_CHECK=PASS). dev.env preserves empty token (fail-loud preserved). ./smackerel.sh test unit returns 41 Go packages green plus 330 Python tests pass. No hardcoded tokens in any tracked file (git ls-files | xargs grep returns no matches).

sed of config.sh confirms auto-gen block at lines 314-318 with openssl rand -hex 24 and python3 fallback. test.env is 9357 bytes, SMACKEREL_AUTH_TOKEN line is 69 bytes (48 hex chars + KEY= + newline). config/generated/ confirmed gitignored via git check-ignore. All 21 DoD items checked with inline evidence.
Artifact lint PASSED for BUG-006-test-auth-token-provisioning. State, scope status, report sections, specialist phase records, and DoD evidence all coherent.
Bug closed. Status promoted to done with real captured evidence.

completedScopes: Scope 1: Auto-generate test auth token in config generator

notes: Test auth token provisioning fix. Verified at HEAD on 2026-04-24 with real captured commands. config.sh auto-gen block at lines 314-318. test.env token = 48 hex chars. dev.env token preserved empty. Two consecutive runs produce different tokens (cryptographic freshness).
